name: ics_calendar_invite
description: Meeting with ICS calendar file attachment

input.subject: Meeting Invitation: Product Launch Planning
input.snippet: You have been invited to a meeting...
input.body_text:
You have been invited to a meeting.

Please see the attached calendar invitation for details.

Looking forward to your participation.

John Smith
Product Manager

notes: ICS attachments are parsed deterministically by ics_parser (not by LLM). The LLM only sees a body that says 'Please see the attached calendar invitation' — no event details to extract.
